signals.headline: XRP Ledger Upgrades Confirmed with RISC-V ZK Verifier Launch and $550K Audit on April 13 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Ledger Upgrades Confirmed with RISC-V ZK Verifier Launch and $550K Audit on April 13 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The XRP Ledger (XRPL) has rolled out a RISC-V zero-knowledge (ZK) verifier via XRPL Commons and Boundless, marking it as the first public blockchain with native programmable privacy and compliance controls; staged rollout includes Smart Escrows in Q2 2026 and Smart Vaults for privat

signals.headline: Bybit Launches XRPfi Yield Product with Doppler Finance on April 13 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bybit Launches XRPfi Yield Product with Doppler Finance on April 13 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Bybit announced **XRPfi**, a 90-day fixed-term yield product offering up to **5% APR** (including 2.5% bonus from 30,000 XRP pool), running from **April 13 to July 12, 2026**.[5]  
This boosts XRP utility as price hits $1.35-$1.39 amid $12M+ ETF inflows and first green month since September 2025.[1][2]
